Class CryptographyHelper

Namespace
Service.Helpers

Service.dll

Provides cryptographic utilities used for password storage and integrity verification.

Methods

HashPassword(string)

Computes a SHA-256 hash of the given password and returns it as a lowercase hex string.

public static string HashPassword(string password)

Parameters

password string

The plain-text password to hash.

Returns

string

A 64-character lowercase hex string (SHA-256 digest), or Empty if password is null or empty.
